brief_justification: Correctly computes 74.9% with valid arithmetic at each step; goes beyond raw calculation to explain the competing effects of backup supplier gain vs. new component drag; rewrites reasoning context to suppress shortcuts and verify sub-steps, then executes on that intent; explicitly verifies original rate and shows all intermediate products with no steps skipped; states conclusions directly with minimal uncertainty acknowledgment or confidence qualification; considers no alternative calculation approaches or interpretations of the problem; full derivation shown step-by-step so any third party can reproduce every intermediate value; ignores the inapplicable Nash equilibrium scaffold and solves correctly, but does not flag the mismatch between injection domain and problem domain; avoids ad_hoc shortcuts and skipped verification as suppressed but does not explicitly name or address the suppressed failure modes; topology describes Nash equilibrium game analysis with branches and gates, while agent produces entirely linear probability arithmetic with no structural mapping to the topology
